title: Macterm layout
description: DEPRECATED: superseded by the central project files in ~/.config/macterm/projects/ (see project.schema.json). A .macterm/layout.yaml is only read once, on a project's first open, to seed its central file; support is removed entirely in the next release.

name.description: The project this layout was authored for. On apply, a mismatch against the active project prompts a confirmation. Optional — a file without it applies to any project without warning.

tabs.description: The tabs to create, in order.

tab.description: A tab: a layout node (a leaf pane or a split) with an optional `name`. There's no `layout:` wrapper — the node's fields sit at the tab level.

node.description: A node in the split tree. Either a leaf pane (cwd/run/shell) or a split (a `split` mapping). A bare {} is a plain-shell pane.

name.description: Tab title. On apply, matched against live tabs by this name.

cwd.description: Working directory, project-relative (resolved against the project root). Omit for the project root itself. '~' is expanded; absolute paths pass through.

run.description: Command typed into the pane's shell on launch (e.g. "npm run dev"). Omit for a plain shell. The command runs inside the shell, so the prompt survives when it exits.

shell.description: Shell binary to launch for this pane (e.g. "/bin/zsh"). Omit to use the shell from your Ghostty config (else your login shell).

pane.title: Pane (leaf)
pane.description: A terminal pane. With no fields ({}) it's a plain shell.

paneTab.title: Pane tab (leaf)
paneTab.description: A single-pane tab. With no pane fields it's a plain shell.

direction.description: Split direction. 'horizontal' = side by side (first | second); 'vertical' = stacked (first / second).

ratio.description: Divider position, 0–1. Defaults to 0.5 (an even split).

split.title: Split
split.description: Splits the area into two child nodes via a nested `split` mapping.

splitTab.title: Split tab
splitTab.description: A tab split into two child nodes.
